articles.title: 'The deep sea will come to me': The blackwater diver who photographs the creatures of the deep - BBC
articles.description: When photographer Jialing Cai plunged into the ocean in the dead of night, she found creatures of the deep had risen up to meet her.

articles.title: The Pokemon Company posts its best numbers ever in latest yearly financial results report - Nintendo Everything
articles.description: A new report went up this week detailing The Pokemon Company’s latest financial results, and once again, records were achieved across the board. For net sales, The Pokemon Company recorded 531 billion yen for more than a 29 percent year-on-year increase. Oper…
